TestCase z34Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_arr = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_arr, t1.arr, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.arr = follow_case_arr;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Operation: divide each non‑zero element by 3.0
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        if (follow_case.arr[i] != 0.0) {
            follow_case.arr[i] = follow_case.arr[i] / 3.0;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
